mapper.select:
select id, code, name, description from roles
( code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into roles(code, name, description, created_at, updated_at) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update roles set code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from user_roles where role_id = #{roleId}
select permission_id from sys_role_permissions where role_id = #{roleId} order by permission_id asc

select id, module_code, module_name, icon, sort_order, status from sys_modules
( module_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or module_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by sort_order asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_modules(module_code, module_name, icon, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) values(#{moduleCode}, #{moduleName}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_modules set module_code = #{moduleCode}, module_name = #{moduleName}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_modules set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_menus where module_id = #{moduleId}
select count(1) from sys_permissions where module_id = #{moduleId}

select m.id, m.module_id, sm.module_code, sm.module_name, sm.icon as module_icon, sm.sort_order as module_sort_order, m.parent_id, m.menu_code, m.menu_name, m.route_path, m.component_key, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.status from sys_menus m inner join sys_modules sm on sm.id = m.module_id where m.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update sys_menus set module_id = #{moduleId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_code = #{menuCode}, menu_name = #{menuName}, route_path = #{routePath}, component_key = #{componentKey}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_menus set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_menus where parent_id = #{parentId}
select count(1) from sys_permissions where menu_id = #{menuId}

select p.id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.permission_type, p.module_id, sm.module_code, sm.module_name, p.menu_id, m.menu_code, m.menu_name, p.status, p.built_in, p.remark from sys_permissions p inner join sys_modules sm on sm.id = p.module_id left join sys_menus m on m.id = p.menu_id where p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update sys_permissions set permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, module_id = #{moduleId}, menu_id = #{menuId}, status = #{status}, built_in = #{builtIn}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_permissions set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_role_permissions where permission_id = #{permissionId}
select count(1) from sys_api_permission_bindings where permission_id = #{permissionId}

select b.id, b.permission_id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, b.http_method, b.path_pattern, b.controller_class, b.status from sys_api_permission_bindings b inner join sys_permissions p on p.id = b.permission_id where b.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update sys_api_permission_bindings set permission_id = #{permissionId}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, path_pattern = #{pathPattern}, controller_class = #{controllerClass}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_api_permission_bindings set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
